name: playwright-cli
tagline: Command reference for driving the playwright-cli browser-automation tool: navigation, input, network mocking, storage, tracing, and video.
verdict: Thorough, example-rich command reference with a good on-demand references/ split and a clear install-fallback path. Weaknesses: description states what it does but not when to invoke it, no stated exclusions from adjacent tasks, only the CLI-missing failure case is addressed while other likely failures (stale refs, timeouts, crashes) are silent, no.

highlights.summary: `npm install -g @playwright/cli@latest` installs the official package but unpinned via the mutable @latest tag.
Description 'Automate browser interactions, test web pages and work with Playwright tests.' states what it does but no 'use when' phrasing or trigger examples.
No 'NOT for' / exclusion text anywhere despite overlapping the sibling playwright-triage skill.
